long_description:
[MON] Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics is Triggered

TIP Situation: Sysdig agent pod is Ready but missing all metrics
TIP Short Description: The Sysdig agent pod is Ready on node wdc1-qz1-sr7-rk089-s48 in mzone757 but it is not exposing any metrics
TIP Console: toc
TIP Self Healing: true
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds: 4200
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:us-east::mzone757:pod:sysdig-agent-compute-6zlwg
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
